records.description: Docker manifest not found — may be platform-specific; set default platform to linux/amd64

shortest_verification.command: bash -c 'echo "Error response from daemon: manifest for node:19-alpine not found: manifest unknown: manifest unknown." >&2; exit 1'

fix_path.description: Docker manifest not found — may be platform-specific; set default platform to linux/amd64

legacy_v3.description: Docker manifest not found — may be platform-specific; set default platform to linux/amd64

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "Error response from daemon: manifest for node:19-alpine not found: manifest unknown: manifest unknown." >&2; exit 1'

records.description: Docker image/repository not found — may need login; ensure DOCKER_CONFIG is set

stderr_regex: pull access denied.*repository does not exist|image.*not found

shortest_verification.command: bash -c 'echo "Error response from daemon: pull access denied for mycompany/nonexistent, repository does not exist or may require docker login" >&2; exit 1'
shortest_verification.expected_stderr_match: pull access denied.*repository does not exist

fix_path.description: Docker image/repository not found — may need login; ensure DOCKER_CONFIG is set

legacy_v3.stderr_pattern: pull access denied.*repository does not exist|image.*not found
legacy_v3.description: Docker image/repository not found — may need login; ensure DOCKER_CONFIG is set

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "Error response from daemon: pull access denied for mycompany/nonexistent, repository does not exist or may require docker login" >&2; exit 1'
reproduction.expected_stderr_match: pull access denied.*repository does not exist
